name: Sigmar's Toll
overview: “You fell, with glory, at the great battle of the Athelwyrd, as hope again took root within the Emerald Realm.” As Embergard reels in the wake of the Skaven’s incursion, Knight-Questor Leodus is guided by Sigmar's vision to counter the assault.

trailers.title: Sigmar's Toll: Official Trailer – Warhammer+ | Warhammer Age of Sigmar
